title: Diplazium rude
taxonomy: Diplazium rude is a species of fern belonging to the family Athyriaceae. This family is part of the larger division Pteridophyta, which encompasses all types of ferns. Diplazium rude is specifically classified under the genus Diplazium, which contains various species of ferns commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. The classification of Diplazium rude is further detailed into the family, genus, and species levels, providing a clear understanding of its botanical identity. The classification is a fundamental aspect of understanding the plant's evolutionary history and its relationship with other organisms.
